basics.name: Joe Oliveira
basics.label: 永遠の痛み
basics.summary: I am a mixed designer and developer. I have spent the majority of my life programming and getting to love the art that it truely is. But I want to take it a step farther with my Game Design degree, I want to truely be able ot design and create unique worlds and experiances. I have a long standing IT background as well, I have thrived in this enviroment, I believe, thanks to a very logical way of thinking about problems and solutions. I can fix anything and everything!

paragraphs: I am a mixed designer and developer. I have spent the majority of my life programming and getting to love the art that it truely is. But I want to take it a step farther with my Game Design degree, I want to truely be able ot design and create unique worlds and experiances. I have a long standing IT background as well, I have thrived in this enviroment, I believe, thanks to a very logical way of thinking about problems and solutions. I can fix anything and everything!

interests.name: Hiking
interests.description: Exploring the outdoors: From hiking trails to camping under the stars, I love connecting with nature and recharging in the open air.

interests.name: Rock Climbing
interests.description: Testing my limits and building strength, one climb at a time. I don't rock climb anywhere near as much as I used to, but its still a deep passion.(Ask me about my back!)

interests.name: Music
interests.description: Long time basist, I come from a very musically gifted family. I am not one of them, hella tone deaf. But I still love it!

interests.name: Culinary Adventures
interests.description: Fun fact, I got accepted into one of the top culinary institutes in the country when I was 14! I love to cook food represetative of my heritage and meals that just generally look good.

interests.name: Gaming
interests.description: Both playing and creating games—constantly inspired by the worlds, mechanics, and stories within. Especially now that I am forwarding myself into the gaming industry!

interests.name: Cinema
interests.description: I’m a movie buff at heart, favorite movies of all time are 'Monty Python's Holy Grail', 'Kung Pow!: Enter The Fist', and the 'Chainsaw Man Movie'. I wish TikTok would stop playing the piano tracks all the time, its too depressing.

skills.name: Engines & Tools
keywords: Mobile Development with Java, Swift and Obj-C

summary: Developed modular automation scripts for inventory and reporting systems, significantly reducing manual workload and improving efficiency.
Led onboarding and technical training sessions, streamlining team productivity and enhancing service quality.
Executed complex tasks including micro-soldering, server deployment, cybersecurity hardening, and troubleshooting.
Designed and implemented network solutions adhering to federal cybersecurity standards, improving reliability and maintainability.
Led USDA server EOL replacements across Oregon with zero downtime and flawless connectivity.
Completed deployments under budget and ahead of schedule, known for speed and precision.
Used system metrics and diagnostics to preempt issues, reducing downtime and stabilizing infrastructure.
Built and launched a custom mobile trivia game with dynamic question randomization over a 300-question dataset.
Patched critical bugs in Flowhub’s cannabis compliance platform, boosting stability and performance.
Created inventory and customer management systems for small businesses, replacing manual spreadsheets.
Designed and deployed 100+ client websites with e-commerce, scheduling, and secure authentication.
Prioritized privacy-focused dev, minimizing tracking and aligning with regulatory needs.
Maintained IT infrastructure reliability through proactive monitoring and optimizations, ensuring minimal downtime and robust performance.
Delivered enterprise-level hardware/software support across 200+ client sites in Oregon.
Performed diagnostics, repairs, and user training to achieve a 100% resolution rate.
Optimized task scheduling and contributed to the IT knowledge base.

projects.title: Rogue Slots
projects.summary: A chaotic roguelike where slot mechanics fuel player powers and feedback loops.
projects.contribution: Combat Design • Technical Systems • UI/UX • Player Feedback

projects.title: Treehouse
projects.summary: A stealth-building narrative hybrid where grief is rebuilt one wall at a time.
projects.role: UI/UX, Menus, Building System, Inventory, HUD, Glasses Tracker
projects.contribution: Systems Designer / UI/UX Developer / Technical Designer

projects.title: Mechanics Inferno
projects.summary: A simple vertical platformer exploring trust in mechanical systems.
projects.contribution: Solo Designer (Level Design • Scripting • Lighting • Audio • Playtesting)

projects.title: Mystic Fishing
projects.summary: Track mythical creatures in a lore-based fishing adventure made in 30 days.

awards.title: 3rd Place – Full Sail Hall of Fame Game Jam
awards.summary: Treehouse won 3rd place in the 24-hour game jam themed “Dreams.”

awards.title: Member – National Society of Collegiate Scholars
awards.summary: Inducted for academic achievement and leadership potential.

volunteer.summary: Supported troops during summer camp and led climbing safety lessons.

downloads.name: Japanese Resume - 日本語履歴書
